summary: Research complete for generate-todo.sh — mapped TODO.md structure section by section, verified state.json v1.1.0 has all fields needed for full generation, analyzed generate-task-order.sh integration strategy (call with --print rather than absorb), documented artifact rendering rules, dependency formatting, status mapping, edge cases for terminal tasks and missing fields, and recommended logging format matching existing .claude/logs/ convention

artifacts.summary: Research on TODO.md generation from state.json: full structure mapping, state.json field-to-rendering mapping, generate-task-order.sh integration approach, artifact rendering logic, edge cases, and logging format
